description:
Obsessive barking isn't just annoying; it’s a symptom of a pack in chaos. In this special compilation, we’re looking back at the most extreme barking cases in show history: dogs that barked at doorbells, vacuums, and even their own shadows for up to 7 years straight.
Desperate owners on the verge of eviction brought in Cesar Millan for what they thought was an "unfixable" problem. Watch as Cesar reveals the secret formula of Spirit → Instinct → Heart → Mind to flip the switch from nuclear noise
title: Cesar Millan Fixes 8 Obsessive Barking Dogs
